chunks.text: MAK/PS ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Const. Petition No. S-1238 of 2025 __________________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature(s) of Judge(s) Hearing of Case. 1. For orders on office objections. 2. For hearing of Misc. No. 7807/25 3. For hearing of main case. 17.11.2025. Syed Muhammad Sault Rizvi, Advocate for Petitioner. Mr. Ali Zardari, Assistant Advocate General Sindh. Ms. Rahat Ahsan, DPG DSP Zafar Iqbal, SDPO Eidgah, SHO Ali Baqir and S.I. Shahid Mehmood PS Napier. DSP Raza Mian, Legal II CPO ------------------------------------ Petitioner through instant petition seeks following relief:- a) Hold and declare that the harassment as caused to Petitioner by Official Respondent merely on the complaint of non-providing of Parking space is without lawful authority, illegal, and of no legal effect. b) Hold and declare that SHO, P.S. Napier, has no authority to compel or harass the petitioner for getting the rented premises as the subject matter of tenancy is purely a civil dispute. c) Restrain permanently the Official Respondents including SHO, P.S. Napier, Karachi, strictly from interfering, compelling and harassing the petitioner in relation to complaint filed by the private respondent which is a private dispute (if any). d) Award any other relief as deemed just and proper in the circumstances of the case. Pursuant to court notices official respondents have filed their comments, which are taken on record, wherein it is undertaken that no harassment would be caused to the petitioner. Mr. Humayon Rashid, Advocate files Vakalatnama on behalf of Respondent No.6 and state at bar that Respondent No.6 will not cause any harassment to the petitioner.

Mr. Humayon Rashid, Advocate files Vakalatnama on behalf of Respondent No.6 and state at bar that Respondent No.6 will not cause any harassment to the petitioner. Learned AAG and DPG submits that in terms of prayer clauses official respondents shall conduct themselves strictly in accordance with law and no harassment would be caused to the petitioner. Learned counsel for the petitioner seeks disposal of the instant petition in view of the replies filed by the official respondents and statement made by the AAG & DPG. Order accordingly. Petition stands disposed of in the above terms alongwith all pending applications. A copy of this order shall be sent to SSP (East) Karachi for compliance. JUDGE
